skill.name: frontend-slides
skill.description: Create stunning, animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or by converting PowerPoint files. Use when the user wants to build a presentation, convert a PPT/PPTX to web, or create slides for a conference talk, pitch deck, or tutorial.
skill.summary: Create animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or by converting PowerPoint files with distinctive visual styling.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This skill generates HTML presentations and converts PowerPoint files. Static analysis detected external_commands, network, and filesystem patterns, but evaluation confirms these are false positives. The 'external_commands' are documentation strings showing file paths. Network access is limited to loading font resources from legitimate CDNs. Filesystem operations are for extracting PPT content. No malicious intent or security risks identified.

content.value_statement: Non-designers struggle to create visually appealing presentations. This skill generates production-quality HTML slide decks with distinctive styling and smooth animations through a guided visual exploration workflow.
actual_capabilities: Generate zero-dependency HTML presentations with inline CSS and JavaScript
Convert PowerPoint files (PPT/PPTX) to animated HTML presentations
Create style previews for users to visually explore design options
Implement scroll-triggered animations using Intersection Observer
Add keyboard navigation, touch/swipe support, and progress indicators
Apply distinctive visual styling with custom fonts and color themes
limitations: Does not support real-time collaborative editing
Cannot extract complex PowerPoint animations or transitions
Requires manual final tweaks for exact pixel-perfect layouts
No built-in export to PDF or other static formats

use_cases.title: Conference Talk Slides
use_cases.description: Create visually striking slides for tech talks or keynotes with custom animations and distinctive aesthetics that stand out from typical presentations.

use_cases.title: Startup Pitch Deck
use_cases.description: Generate professional pitch decks with polished visual design to impress investors and clients with minimal design effort.
use_cases.target_user: Startup founders, sales professionals, business development

use_cases.title: Convert Existing PPT to Web
use_cases.description: Transform legacy PowerPoint presentations into modern HTML format with enhanced animations and better browser compatibility.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams, trainers, content creators with existing slides

prompt_templates.title: New Presentation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a new HTML presentation about [TOPIC]. I need it for [PURPOSE]. Make it visually impressive with smooth animations.

prompt_templates.title: Style Exploration
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to create slides with a [VIBE] feel. Generate some style previews so I can pick the right aesthetic.

prompt_templates.title: PPT Conversion
prompt_templates.prompt: Convert my PowerPoint file at [FILE_PATH] into an HTML presentation with distinctive styling.

prompt_templates.title: Enhance Existing
prompt_templates.prompt: Improve my existing HTML presentation at [FILE_PATH] with better animations and visual design.

output_examples.input: Create a pitch deck for my AI startup
output_examples.output: Your presentation is ready! File: ai-startup-pitch.html. Style: Neon Cyber with dark backgrounds. 12 slides with entrance animations, progress bar, and navigation dots. Use arrow keys or scroll to navigate.

output_examples.input: Convert my quarterly-report.pptx to web format
output_examples.output: Extracted 15 slides from your PowerPoint. Now selecting a style - I've created 3 preview options (Corporate Elegant, Dark Executive, Clean Minimal). Which aesthetic resonates with you?

best_practices: Start with clear content structure before styling - know your message first
Use the style preview phase to let users discover their visual preference
Keep animations subtle and purposeful - enhance, don't distract
Test on mobile devices and disable heavy effects for smaller screens
anti_patterns: Avoid using generic font choices like Inter or Roboto - strive for distinctive typography
Do not overuse animations - they should enhance, not delay the message
Avoid purple gradients on white backgrounds - this is generic AI aesthetic
Do not skip the style preview phase - users need visual confirmation before full generation

faq.question: How does this skill differ from PowerPoint?
faq.answer: This skill creates HTML presentations that run in any browser with smooth animations and distinctive styling. Unlike PowerPoint, each presentation is a single HTML file with no dependencies.

faq.question: Can I edit the generated HTML later?
faq.answer: Yes, the output is clean, well-commented HTML that you can modify. CSS variables at the top make theme changes easy.

faq.question: What styles are available?
faq.answer: Styles include Corporate Elegant, Dark Executive, Neon Cyber, Bold Gradients, Paper & Ink, Cinematic Dark, and more. The skill generates previews so you can choose.

faq.question: Does it work with Mac and Windows?
faq.answer: Yes, the output is platform-independent HTML that works in any modern browser on Mac, Windows, or Linux.

faq.question: Can I add my own images?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill supports adding images. For PPT conversion, images are automatically extracted. For new presentations, you can reference image paths.

faq.question: How do I present?
faq.answer: Open the HTML file in a browser. Use arrow keys, spacebar, or scroll to navigate. Click navigation dots to jump to specific slides.
